name: pi auto inject env var outranks unrelated extension memory
query: Asaki memory Pi extension agent-decided memory retrieval auto inject disabled default ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_INJECT

memories.content: atomic-commit extension now generates English Conventional Commit subjects from git status/worktree changes instead of extracting assistant/user conversation text; it also filters key-exit-debug.log from auto-commit summaries and temp-index commits as runtime noise.

Asaki memory Pi extension auto-injection was optimized: automatic memory search now only runs when the prompt matches memory-needed cues unless ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_INJECT_ALWAYS is enabled; empty/no-injection search displays are hidden unless ASAKI_MEMORY_DEBUG is enabled.

name: endpoint query prefers exact endpoint over same broad route words
query: POST /v1/memories/search returns score_details and search results

memories.content: POST /v1/memories/search searches active memories and returns score_details for each result.
POST /v1/memories/candidates processes add merge ignore decisions for memory candidates.

name: secret handling query prefers admin api key rule
query: how should ADMIN_API_KEY be stored for Cloudflare deploy

memories.content: Use Wrangler secrets for ADMIN_API_KEY and never commit raw credentials.
Keep wrangler.example.jsonc generic and safe for public repos; wrangler.jsonc stays local.

name: source of truth query prefers D1 Vectorize architecture decision
query: D1 source of truth Vectorize recoverable index

memories.content: D1 is the source of truth; Vectorize is a recoverable semantic index.
The project stack is Cloudflare Workers, Hono, TypeScript, D1, Vectorize, and Workers AI.

name: scope query prefers current project over global broad preference
query: run npm run typecheck after TypeScript edits

memories.content: Run npm run typecheck after TypeScript edits.
主公 prefers concise answers and minimal changes when coding.

name: path query prefers exact file path memory
query: src/services/memories.ts search fallback Vectorize lexical behavior

memories.content: src/services/memories.ts keeps hybrid Vectorize plus D1 lexical fallback search behavior.
src/services/reviews.ts manages memory review queue creation, listing, and resolution.

name: candidate dedupe eval query prefers threshold guidance
query: after changing candidate dedupe thresholds prompts run eval candidates

memories.content: Run npm run eval:candidates after changing candidate dedupe thresholds or prompts.
Use search eval cases to tune retrieval score thresholds and ranking behavior.

name: conversation extraction query prefers agent-side rule
query: do not send full conversation transcripts Worker extraction endpoint

memories.content: The active conversation agent extracts durable memory and calls asaki_memory_add; do not send full conversation transcripts to the Worker.
Structured memory extraction can normalize subject, predicate, object, scope, kind, and entities before storage.

name: auto inject threshold query prefers min score env var

memories.content: Pi auto inject defaults to ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_MIN_SCORE=0.50; keep low-score memories out of injected context.
Use eval cases to tune search score thresholds before changing ranking weights.

name: project scope query requires project id
query: explicit scope project search must require project_id

memories.content: Explicit scope=project search must require project_id.
Default search includes global memories plus the current project and session memories.

name: session scope query requires session id
query: explicit scope session search must require session_id

memories.content: Explicit scope=session search must require session_id.
Explicit scope=project search must require project_id.

name: vectorize upsert failure keeps d1 write
query: Vectorize upsert fails keep D1 write index_status pending failed

memories.content: If Vectorize upsert fails, keep the D1 write and mark index_status=pending or failed.
Vector search failures are logged as vector_search_failed events before lexical fallback runs.

name: review resolve query prefers review queue memory
query: memory review resolve pending add merge ignore

memories.content: Memory review queue supports pending review items and resolving them as add, merge, or ignore.
Candidate dedupe chooses add, merge, or ignore decisions for incoming memory candidates.

name: public docs query prefers placeholder credentials rule
query: README examples placeholders not production credentials personal endpoints

memories.content: README examples must use placeholders, not production credentials or personal endpoints.
wrangler.example.jsonc should stay generic and safe for public repos.

name: debug display query prefers score details integration
query: Pi MCP search results debug show score_details

memories.content: Pi and MCP search results should optionally display score_details in debug mode while keeping default output concise.
Use search eval cases to tune retrieval score thresholds and ranking behavior.

name: omitted scope query prefers no vectorize prefilter rule
query: scope omitted do not prefilter Vectorize project session default search global current project session

memories.content: Do not prefilter Vectorize by project or session when scope is omitted; default search must include global plus the current project and session.
When explicit scope=project is provided, filter search results by the requested project_id.

name: hybrid fallback query prefers memories service search behavior
query: search uses Vectorize D1 lexical fallback current token entity fallback

memories.content: Search should keep hybrid Vectorize plus D1 lexical fallback behavior with current token and entity scoring.
Future work may add D1 FTS5 BM25 recall alongside Vectorize before final rerank.

name: lifecycle query prefers stale archived policy
query: stale archived low confidence long unused memories lowered weight

memories.content: Lifecycle policy should suggest stale or archived memories and lower weight for low confidence or long-unused memories.
Memory status can be active, archived, or deleted.
